name: Prototype Foundation
goal: Prove local snapshot and restore safety
exit_criteria: 20 repos restored; no Git corruption; untracked files restored

name: Personal Alpha
exit_criteria: 25 alpha users; P50 ready under 10 minutes; zero data loss

name: Trust Beta
goal: Safe enough for paid personal beta
exit_criteria: 500 beta users; 40 percent second-device activation; restore success above 95 percent

name: Paid Pro
exit_criteria: 1000 paid users target; storage cost controlled; cohort retention improving

name: Team Preview
goal: Make individual trust useful to teams
exit_criteria: 10 design partners; measured onboarding or recovery time saved

name: Agent Workspaces
exit_criteria: Agent workspace creation under 30 seconds; rollback above 99 percent

name: Better Git Layer
goal: Expose new source-control UX with Git compatibility
exit_criteria: Meaningful workflows without manual branch/stash/worktree commands
